stage.title: Development Stage
stage.text: Cognethra is currently in research, architecture formation, and ecosystem integration preparation within the SOVRA / Entelekron / TVK stack.

about.featuredTitle: Cognethra turns raw knowledge into structured cognition.
about.featuredText: It is designed to help AI agents and human-facing systems reason over information, remember context, evaluate decisions, and produce explainable intelligence.
about.sisterText: Cerebthra focuses on the core cognitive intelligence architecture. Cognethra extends this vision into knowledge synthesis, memory, thought verification, and operational reasoning workflows.

capabilities.title: Reasoning, memory, proof, and cognitive optimization for sovereign AI systems.
capabilities.text: Cognethra is designed as a high-level cognition layer that connects SOVRA agents, GraphVAULT memory, Proof-of-Thought governance, and Entelekron intelligence modules.
capabilities.c1d: Structured reasoning paths, decision support, inference chains, scenario comparison, and explainable outputs.
capabilities.c2d: Transform documents, events, signals, and memory into connected understanding and actionable intelligence.
capabilities.c3d: Connects to GraphVAULT for long-term context, entity relationships, event history, and knowledge continuity.
capabilities.c4d: Supports verifiable reasoning records, governance contributions, cognitive proofs, and MindDAO-style decision systems.
capabilities.c5d: Improves agent planning, task prioritization, memory recall, interaction context, and multi-step execution.
capabilities.c6d: Future-ready for cognitive dashboards, learning systems, productivity support, and guided reasoning experiences.

process.title: From information to cognition.
process.text: Cognethra follows a four-layer cognitive process: ingest, connect, reason, and prove.
process.l1d: Documents, signals, actions, conversations, governance events, and system outputs enter the cognitive layer.
process.l2d: GraphVAULT maps entities, relationships, timelines, source context, and semantic relevance.
process.l3d: SOVRA and Cognethra evaluate scenarios, derive insights, compare strategies, and form structured reasoning paths.
process.l4d: ChronoSeal and Proof-of-Thought logic can timestamp, verify, and preserve important reasoning events.

ecosystem.title: The cognitive layer connecting knowledge, memory, agents, and governance.
ecosystem.text: Cognethra links SOVRA Core, Cerebthra, GraphVAULT, ChronoSeal, MindDAO, EnteleVAULT, Sentient Signals, Ava Sentient, EnteleSCAN, and future cognitive AI interfaces.

usecases.title: Designed for advanced AI cognition, research, governance, and decision intelligence.
usecases.text: Cognethra can support AI agents, knowledge workers, researchers, governance systems, validator operations, and sovereign AI infrastructure.
usecases.u1d: Memory-aware agent workflows, task decomposition, decision explanation, and autonomous planning support.
usecases.u2d: Thought contributions, decision trails, proposal reasoning, participation quality, and governance intelligence.
usecases.u3d: Synthesize whitepapers, legal documents, technical docs, market reports, and project archives.
usecases.u4d: Reason over validator performance, security events, uptime, governance, and operational recommendations.
usecases.u5d: Connect Sentient Signals data, market narratives, risk context, and decision-support reasoning.
usecases.u6d: Future cognitive dashboards for learning, planning, memory, focus, productivity, and decision support.

roadmap.title: From cognitive concept to sovereign intelligence infrastructure.
roadmap.p1d: Launch Cognethra identity, website, documentation, module definition, and ecosystem positioning.
roadmap.p2d: Connect GraphVAULT, document intelligence, semantic memory, entity mapping, and reasoning context.
roadmap.p3d: Build reasoning records, thought contribution scoring, governance logic, and ChronoSeal timestamping.
roadmap.p4d: Integrate Cognethra into SOVRA agents, dashboards, MindDAO, and Entelekron intelligence systems.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about Cognethra
faq.text: Answers about Cognethra cognitive intelligence architecture, ecosystem integration, and research access.

items.a: Cognethra is a cognitive intelligence architecture within the SOVRA / Entelekron ecosystem. It is designed for knowledge synthesis, reasoning chains, semantic memory, Proof-of-Thought systems, and AI-assisted decision intelligence.

items.q: How does Cognethra relate to SOVRA and Entelekron?
items.a: SOVRA provides sovereign operational reasoning and agent intelligence. Entelekron provides trust infrastructure. Cognethra serves as the cognitive layer connecting knowledge, memory, reasoning proofs, and agent cognition across the TVK ecosystem.

items.q: Is Cognethra a medical or neurotechnology product?
items.a: No. Cognethra is a research-stage cognitive AI infrastructure concept. It is not medical advice, diagnosis, or a clinical neurotechnology product.
Proof-of-Thought refers to verifiable reasoning records, governance contributions, and cognitive proofs that can support MindDAO-style decision systems and auditable intelligence workflows.

items.q: Can I install Cognethra on my phone?
items.a: Yes. The Cognethra mobile web app supports Add to Home Screen on iOS, Android install prompts on Chrome, and desktop PWA installation via supported browsers.

items.q: How do I join the Cognethra research network?
items.a: Contact team@cognethra.org if you are an AI researcher, knowledge graph team, cognitive system builder, governance designer, or SOVRA / Entelekron collaborator.

appPromo.title: Get the Cognethra cognitive intelligence app

privacy.intro: Cognethra is operated by T.V.K. Labs & Technologies LTD as part of the TVK ecosystem. This policy describes how we handle information when you visit www.cognethra.org or use the Cognethra mobile web app.
privacy.s1p: Our static website and PWA do not require account registration. We may collect standard server logs (IP address, browser type, pages visited) through our hosting provider for security and performance. If you contact us by email, we process the information you provide to respond to your inquiry.
privacy.s2p: The Cognethra app may use browser local storage and service worker caches to enable offline access and installable app functionality. We do not use third-party advertising trackers on this site.
privacy.s3p: We do not sell personal data. Information may be shared with service providers (such as hosting) strictly as needed to operate the website, or when required by law.

terms.intro: By accessing www.cognethra.org or the Cognethra app, you agree to these terms. Cognethra is a research and development platform concept operated by T.V.K. Labs & Technologies LTD.
terms.s1p: Cognethra is under research, development, and pilot preparation. Content, previews, and interfaces are provided for informational purposes and do not constitute a finished product, medical advice, or professional services.
terms.s2p: You agree not to misuse the website, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with service operation, or use Cognethra materials in violation of applicable law or third-party rights.
terms.s3p: Cognethra branding, content, and architecture descriptions are owned by T.V.K. Labs & Technologies LTD or its licensors. MIT-licensed repository code is governed by the LICENSE file in this project.
terms.s4p: The site and app are provided "as is" without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, T.V.K. Labs & Technologies LTD is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of this website or app.

disclaimer.intro: Cognethra is a cognitive AI infrastructure concept within the SOVRA / Entelekron / TVK ecosystem. It is not medical advice, clinical neurotechnology, or a regulated health product.
disclaimer.s1p: All architecture descriptions, runtime previews, memory interfaces, and roadmap items reflect planned or in-development capabilities. Features shown in the website or app may not be available, complete, or accurate representations of future products.
disclaimer.s2p: Do not rely on Cognethra materials for medical, legal, financial, or safety-critical decisions. Any future cognitive enhancement, biometric, or neural applications require expert review, ethical controls, informed consent, privacy engineering, and legal compliance.
disclaimer.s3p: References to SOVRA, Entelekron, GraphVAULT, MindDAO, and other TVK modules describe ecosystem relationships. Separate terms and policies may apply on those platforms.

blog.author: Cognethra Research Team
blog.title: Introduction to Cognethra Cognitive Architecture
blog.excerpt: How Cognethra connects reasoning, semantic memory, Proof-of-Thought, and agent cognition within the SOVRA / Entelekron ecosystem.
blog.intro: Cognethra is being developed as the cognitive intelligence layer of the TVK ecosystem. This article introduces its architectural layers, ecosystem relationships, and research direction for sovereign AI cognition.
blog.s1t: Why a dedicated cognitive layer matters
blog.s1p: Enterprise AI systems need more than chat interfaces. They need structured reasoning, durable memory, verifiable thought records, and agent-ready cognition. Cognethra is designed to provide that layer between raw information and decision-grade intelligence.
blog.s2t: Four layers: ingest, connect, reason, prove
blog.s2p: Cognethra organizes cognition into four operational layers. Information enters through ingest pipelines, is connected through GraphVAULT semantic memory, is reasoned over with SOVRA agents, and can be preserved through Proof-of-Thought and ChronoSeal verification flows.
blog.s3p: Cognethra is not a standalone product. It is designed to interoperate with SOVRA Core, Entelekron trust modules, MindDAO governance, Sentient Signals, and future human-facing cognitive interfaces across the TVK stack.
blog.s4p: Cognethra is in research and pilot preparation. Researchers, knowledge graph teams, and ecosystem partners can contact team@cognethra.org to discuss collaboration, architecture review, and future integration paths.
